item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2min Believe it or not, I really don't want to talk about the pockets at this World Champ
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2min Believe it or not, I really don't want to talk about the pockets at this World Championship.
I think I've been one of the biggest voices on this, but there's other stuff to talk about too.
HOWEVER... I have just asked Mark Allen about the pockets. You can hear his verdict soon. 1 43

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min SMUDGER GETS OVER THE LINE!
What a contest!
After hitting seven perfect darts in the fin
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min SMUDGER GETS OVER THE LINE!
What a contest!
After hitting seven perfect darts in the final leg of the match, Ross Smith just about gets the job done against Josh Rock - pinning double four to move on in Sindelfingen!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 12 2 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 3min 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗗𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗥𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗬
Ross Smith gets over the line to deny Josh Rock in a last-leg deci
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 3min 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗗𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗥𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗬
Ross Smith gets over the line to deny Josh Rock in a last-leg decider with a 98.6 average and four 180s for a place in tonight's quarter-finals Ross Smith 2 283

item.title: PDCResults: PDCResults @PDCResults · 5min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Last 16, Josh Rock (95.87) 5 (11) 6
item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 5min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Last 16, Josh Rock (95.87) 5 (11) 6 (98.64) Ross Smith 87

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 5min Ross Smith came through a sensational deciding leg against Josh Rock to move into the quarter-fi
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 5min Ross Smith came through a sensational deciding leg against Josh Rock to move into the quarter-final of the European Darts Grand Prix.
Rocky had the darts in the final leg before Smudger hit seven perfects darts to wrestle away control and the match.
Josh Rock 5-6 Ross Smith Mostrar más 1 55
